# israel-nadlan-data-collector

Public-safe collector for Israeli rent benchmark data.

## Scope

- Named public sources only.
- Public bundle generation with provenance metadata.
- Public-safe tests, fixtures, and documentation.

## Core Commands

- `indc --probe`
- `indc --validate`
- `indc sources list`
- `indc build-public-bundle`
- `indc validate-public-bundle`
- `indc write-manifest`

## Public Outputs

- `data/public_bundle/rent_benchmarks.csv`
- `data/public_bundle/locality_crosswalk.csv`
- `data/public_bundle/source_inventory.csv`
- `data/public_bundle/manifest.json`
